name: monata-sim-env
description: Set up local Monata simulation environments with pixi and locally built circuit-tool packages.

interface.shortDescription: Set up a Monata pixi simulation environment
interface.longDescription: Inspect a Monata workspace, build or reuse required local circuit-tool packages, create a project-local pixi environment, install Monata, and verify ngspice plus OpenVAF tooling.
defaultPrompt: Set up Monata simulation in this directory.
